visible_entities.action: chopping orange vegetable with a knife

visible_entities.desc: large kitchen knife with a black handle and a wide silver blade
orange vegetable (carrot) cut into small chunks and slices
large clear plastic jug containing yellow liquid (oil) with a blue and yellow label
blue cylindrical container with white text
small white tub with green text
dark glass bottle with a yellow label

atomic_facts.fact: A person is using a large knife to chop an orange vegetable on a red cutting board.
The chopped vegetable pieces are accumulating in a pile on the board.
The blue container in the background displays the letters 'SA'.
Various cooking ingredients and containers are arranged behind the cutting board.

spatial: The person is positioned to the left of the frame, holding the knife over the red cutting board which occupies the center foreground. The chopped orange vegetable is on top of the cutting board. Behind the cutting board, a blue container is to the left of a large jug of oil, and a bag of nuts is to the right of the oil jug.
